description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chaise with a deep, dark fabric upholstery and a minimalist design. The backrest and armrests are of equal height, forming a continuous, boxy enclosure around the seating area. The seat features subtle tufting with evenly spaced buttons, adding a touch of classic elegance to the otherwise contemporary silhouette. The legs are short, straight, and black, providing sturdy support while maintaining a low profile. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns except for the tufted seat. This piece would fit well in urban parks, public lounges, or sidewalk rest areas.
description: A modern, dark-upholstered chaise with boxy armrests, tufted seat, and short black legs. The design is minimalist and elegant, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the chaise, highlighting the tufted seat, straight backrest, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the solid, rectangular armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, unadorned backrest and both armrests extending to the same height.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and seat depth from the opposite side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, of medium height, and runs the full width of the chaise, featuring subtle button tufting for a classic touch. It is visually continuous with the armrests, creating a boxy, enclosed seating area.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, matching the height and thickness of the backrest, and are rectangular in shape.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and black, likely made of metal or wood, with a simple, unadorned design that supports the modern aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid black with a smooth, matte finish and features button tufting on the seat for added texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, attached seat cushion with button tufting, and the backrest and armrests are integrated into the frame with no separate or loose cushions visible.
